title: stelis spathulata
intro: Stelis spathulata is a species of orchid native to the tropical forests of Central America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that can help soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Stelis spathulata include its potential to reduce inflammation, fight infections, and even exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and optimal usage.
